trans-unit.source: Email must be a valid email address
trans-unit.target: Email must be a valid email address

trans-unit.source: Activation was successful. You can now log in.
trans-unit.target: Activation was successful. You can now log in.

trans-unit.source: Something went wrong with the activation of your account. Please click on the following link to get another activation email:
trans-unit.target: Something went wrong with the activation of your account. Please click on the following link to get another activation email:

trans-unit.source: Email must be a valid email address
trans-unit.target: Email must be a valid email address

trans-unit.source: There is no match data available for this player.
trans-unit.target: There is no match data available for this player.

trans-unit.source: Available Players (Drag & Drop Players to the Team-Containers)
trans-unit.target: Available Players (Drag & Drop Players to the Team-Containers)

trans-unit.source: Won / Lost / Drawn Matches per Game
trans-unit.target: Won / Lost / Drawn Matches per Game

trans-unit.source: Won / Lost / Drawn Matches per Team
trans-unit.target: Won / Lost / Drawn Matches per Team

trans-unit.source: Won / Lost / Drawn Matches per Player
trans-unit.target: Won / Lost / Drawn Matches per Player

trans-unit.source: Please enter your e-mail address so that we can send you a reset link.
trans-unit.target: Please enter your e-mail address so that we can send you a reset link.

trans-unit.source: The request to change the password has been sent. Please check your e-mail inbox.
trans-unit.target: The request to change the password has been sent. Please check your e-mail inbox.

trans-unit.source: Please choose a new password and confirm it
trans-unit.target: Please choose a new password and confirm it

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to Re-Calc all Ratings? This could take some time.
trans-unit.target: Are you sure you want to Re-Calc all Ratings? This could take some time.

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to delete all Chat Messages? This could take some time.
trans-unit.target: Are you sure you want to delete all Chat Messages? This could take some time.

trans-unit.source: At least one Player has to be in each Team.
trans-unit.target: At least one Player has to be in each Team.

trans-unit.source: Your Password has been successfully updated.
trans-unit.target: Your Password has been successfully updated.

trans-unit.source: Your Personal Information has been updated.
trans-unit.target: Your Personal Information has been updated.

trans-unit.source: You can only upload one Image.
trans-unit.target: You can only upload one Image.

trans-unit.source: Your Settings has been successfully updated.
trans-unit.target: Your Settings has been successfully updated.

trans-unit.source: Dark-Theme Settings were reset because the Settings were not saved.
trans-unit.target: Dark-Theme Settings were reset because the Settings were not saved.

trans-unit.source: Your Dashboard Layout has been updated.
trans-unit.target: Your Dashboard Layout has been updated.

trans-unit.source: your registration was successful! Please confirm the Email you just received to complete the activation process.
trans-unit.target: your registration was successful! Please confirm the Email you just received to complete the activation process.

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to remove the Game
trans-unit.target: Are you sure you want to remove the Game

trans-unit.source: All Ratings has been successfully recalculated.
trans-unit.target: All Ratings has been successfully recalculated.

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to recalculate all Match Qualities? This could take some time.
trans-unit.target: Are you sure you want to recalculate all Match Qualities? This could take some time.

trans-unit.source: All Match Qualities has been successfully recalculated.
trans-unit.target: All Match Qualities has been successfully recalculated.

trans-unit.source: All Chat Messages has been successfully deleted.
trans-unit.target: All Chat Messages has been successfully deleted.

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to delete all Live Matches? Note: the State of the normal Match will no be changed.
trans-unit.target: Are you sure you want to delete all Live Matches? Note: the State of the normal Match will no be changed.

trans-unit.source: All Live Matches has been successfully deleted.
trans-unit.target: All Live Matches has been successfully deleted.

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to recalculate all Rating Histories? This could take some time.
trans-unit.target: Are you sure you want to recalculate all Rating Histories? This could take some time.

trans-unit.source: All Rating Histories has been successfully recalculated.
trans-unit.target: All Rating Histories has been successfully recalculated.

trans-unit.source: Successfully sent a Password Reset Email
trans-unit.target: Successfully sent a Password Reset Email
